node.hint: DOUBLE R BAGS Big Eco Cotton Canvas Shopping Bags For Carry Milk Grocery Fruits Vegetable With Reinforced Handles Jhola Bag
DOUBLE R BAGS Big Eco Cotton Canvas Shopping Bags For Carry Milk Grocery Fruits Vegetable With Reinforced Handles Jhola Bag
DOUBLE R BAGS Big Eco Cotton Canvas Shopping Bags For Carry Milk Grocery Fruits Vegetable With Reinforced Handles Jhola Bag

node.text: Eco-Friendly & Sustainable: Made from 100% high-quality cotton canvas, this reusable shopping bag is an ideal choice for those who want to reduce plastic usage and switch to a sustainable lifestyle.

Heavy Duty & Durable: Designed with reinforced stitching and premium fabric, the Double R canvas bag can carry heavy groceries, vegetables, and lunch boxes with ease — making it a heavy-duty grocery tote bag you can rely on.

Spacious Design (33x44.4x20.3 cm): This large canvas cloth bag features a single roomy compartment that accommodates all your essentials, from daily groceries to clothes, making it a multipurpose tote bag for shopping and travel.
Comfortable Hand Carry Handles: Equipped with sturdy and soft handles for easy hand-carry, this canvas carry bag for men and women offers great comfort even during long shopping trips or commutes.

Versatile Usage & Washable: Ideal as a vegetable bag, milk bag, fruit bag, lunch box carrier, or casual jhola tote, this bag is lightweight, foldable, and machine-washable – perfect for daily errands or weekend outings.
RAM LAL RAM CHANDRA (INDIA) LIMITED, RAM LAL RAM CHANDRA INDIA LTD
RAM LAL RAM CHANDRA INDIA LTD
Does it have a waterproof lining?
Proudly MADE IN INDIA Product By DOUBLE R BAGS
Perfect size Bags for Milk, Grocery, Vegetable with Reinforced Handles
You can use for daily use as its long lasting bag with enough space to carry all grocery, vegetables, milk and etc.
Large and Medium size for family size trips to grocery store, great for bulky items since our bags fit up of milk bags when shopping for groceries.
Light weight but spacious enough to accommodate your long shopping list, each handles & stitches are made with extra care to make the product more sturdy & durable. Made in India Product.
Durable - made from laminated canvas material, with handles being easily washable and made to last long.
High capacity carry bag for multipurpose use for our daily life use. Laminated C
done on all top corners by professional machines.

Convenient - bags stand upright and stay open while you pack and unpack groceries, comes with convenient hanging loop for shopping and grocery store checkout lines - Good for hanging outside for milk bag. making these the perfect bags for groceries and shopping.

DOUBLE R BAGS Reusable Jute Tote Bags has one spacious main compartment with wide open mouth and full gusset making easy to load and unload your belongings like groceries, magazines, towels, books, iPad, snacks, and many more.
The handles are thick with Cotton sewn over a bundle of plush fibers for added durability.
Say no to plastic bags for single use

As a symbol of our disposable consumer society, single use plastic bags are a major plague for the environment and the oceans. They have serious consequences on the ecosystem, on marine animals and on mankind.

DOUBLE R BAGS can be used to carry your groceries and other items, which eliminate your plastic waste from shopping bags every time you shop. The handle of the bag are very strong and supportive that help to make easy carrying load of the veggie and groceries.

The Double R Bags Canvas Bags are made in Canvas Fabric . We offer products that are natural, can be reused, offer optimized hygiene, are aesthetically attractive and above all environment acceptable.
The size of the bag are extra large that helps to carry all the veggie or groceries very easy.
Build to last, this large jute bag is durable and will be with you for life
The cotton webbed soft handle is stitched firmly with the bag. It lets you take heavy staff with ease including books
Having a set of Three and Five means you can keep some in your vehicle and a few stowed in another handy place
Contact Us For More Bulk Quantities
Laminated Canvas is Easy cleaning means your bags will not become Dirty from inside
Water proof lining inside. So the inside of the bag can be wiped clean in case of any spillage

node.content-desc: Customer reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,231 global ratings

node.text: Customers find the tote bag to be of good quality, with one noting its excellent capacity, and appreciate its durability, size, and design, particularly the cute cat print. The material receives positive feedback for its good quality, and customers find it useful for grocery shopping, with one mentioning it's great for transporting food for picnics or BBQs. Customers disagree on whether the bag is worth the price.
AI Generated from the text of customer reviews

node.content-desc: Mixed aspect, value for money, 27 mentions

node.text: Size: Pack of 1Style Name: Check Print
I got check print. Material is sturdy. Large. It’s not stiff as shown in picture but quality is good. Print is great

node.hint: Mark this review as helpful BUTTON

node.text: Size: Pack of 6Style Name: Fruits Print
Good quality easy to handle thanks Amazon

node.hint: Mark this review as helpful BUTTON

node.text: I wished it to be bit more bigger. But the quality is absolutely good. Cude with the kitties image on exterior. Interior has plastic lining which makes it easy to clean with quick wipe.

node.hint: Mark this review as helpful BUTTON

node.text: Durable, good looking and spacious shopping bag

node.hint: Mark this review as helpful BUTTON

node.text: Ok product. Did not match my expectations
Size: Pack of 1Style Name: Check Print
It’s mid-size. Not like a big shopper. Also not as sturdy and will not take weight like a big shopper. Does not match my expectations but not a bad product in itself.

node.text: Just loved the design. Spacious and functional. A must-have for all cat lovers!
